name: ruby-googleauth
title: ruby-googleauth
description:
Google Auth Library for Ruby
Allows simple authorization for accessing Google APIs.
Provide support for Application Default Credentials, as described at
https://developers.google.com/accounts/docs/application-default-credentials
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-googleauth because Google Auth Library for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-googleauth as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-googleauth with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-googleauth --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
